dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Do you still work overtime? Man, that's just terrible. Hey, you picked a wrong company.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Me? I'm good. Same stuff, different days.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, think again. Time is not on our side, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Connection lost. The call got lost. Connect again.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: What the?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: What's wrong with this?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Who's?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: We're sorry, but your call cannot be completed at this time. Please hang up and try your call again later. If you need help, please hang up and call technical support.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: What?! What the hell was that?!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Am I seeing things?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: No! That definitely wasn't human! Monster! That must be a monster!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Ugh!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Monsters can't ring a doorbell, right?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Hello, is someone there??

dialogue.speaker: Neighbor
dialogue.line: My cat is missing and someone broke into my place. Please, you have to help me! It can talk too!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: But that's a different voice, though.

dialogue.speaker: Neighbor
dialogue.line: Hey, is anybody home?

dialogue.speaker: Monster
dialogue.line: Ah, something to eat.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Am I hallucinating?

dialogue.speaker: Neighbor
dialogue.line: Hello??? Anybody???

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Jesus...

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Think. I'm really going crazy. Then, what really was that?

dialogue.speaker: Neighbor
dialogue.line: Ahh, hey. Ahh, you were there!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Wh- What's going on? Please! Please help me!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: How do you want me to help you?

dialogue.speaker: Neighbor
dialogue.line: Please call the police for me. I can't remember, but when I woke up, my door was wide open and my cat was gone. And there was blood and empty ramen bags lying around everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Ok, please calm down.

dialogue.speaker: Neighbor
dialogue.line: Hey, where's your phone? I can't find it anywhere. Maybe I lost it. Please report this to the police for me!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Well, why don't you ask the security for help? I don't think I'll be much help in this case.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Hey, by the way, can you show me your arm? Sorry?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Let me see your arm. Beg your pardon?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Your arm. Please show it to me.

dialogue.speaker: Neighbor
dialogue.line: Please open the door.

dialogue.speaker: Monster
dialogue.line: Open the fuck up, you fucking retard.

dialogue.speaker: Monster
dialogue.line: I'm starving to death... Starving.

dialogue.speaker: Monster
dialogue.line: Food?

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Stop. Stop it.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Stop playing that goddamn guitar.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Fucking stop!

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: Damn it.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: I saw it headed for the stairs. Damn it.

dialogue.speaker: Hyun
dialogue.line: I'm here! Come back, you psycho!

summary: Hyun's phone call is interrupted by a strange connection loss, followed by a neighbor frantically asking for help after her cat goes missing and her apartment is broken into. Hyun suspects a monster is involved, especially when he hears a distorted voice and a monster demands food, leading him to confront it.
